vision: A focused mobile application that enables individuals to effortlessly capture, track, and complete daily tasks without unnecessary complexity.

epics.name: Task Creation and Editing
epics.description: Enable users to add new tasks and modify existing task details to maintain an accurate and up-to-date task list.

stories.title: Create task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a new task with a title, so that I can quickly capture items I need to remember.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I enter a task title and confirm Then the task appears in my task list
Given I am creating a task When I submit without a title Then the task is not created and I see a validation message
stories.notes: Foundation feature for the walking skeleton

stories.title: Add optional due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to add an optional due date when creating a task, so that I can track when tasks need to be completed.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a task When I select a due date Then the task is saved with that due date
Given I am creating a task When I skip the due date field Then the task is created without a due date

stories.title: Edit task details after creation
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to edit task details after creation, so that I can correct mistakes or update due dates as plans change.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an existing task When I select edit and modify the title Then the updated title is saved and displayed
Given I have an existing task When I select edit and change the due date Then the updated due date is saved and displayed

epics.name: Task Completion and Deletion
epics.description: Allow users to mark tasks as complete and remove tasks they no longer need, enabling effective task lifecycle management.

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress and see what I have accomplished.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task When I mark it as complete Then the task visually indicates completion status
Given I have a completed task When I mark it as incomplete Then the task returns to incomplete status
stories.notes: Foundation feature for the walking skeleton

stories.title: Delete task from list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task from my list, so that I can remove items that are no longer relevant.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task in my list When I delete the task Then it is permanently removed from my task list
Given I attempt to delete a task When I confirm the deletion Then the task is removed immediately

epics.name: Task List Display
epics.description: Provide users with a clear view of all their tasks including relevant details like due dates in a scrollable interface.

stories.title: View all tasks in scrollable list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a single scrollable list, so that I can see everything I need to do at a glance.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have multiple tasks When I open the app Then I see all tasks displayed in a scrollable list
Given I have no tasks When I open the app Then I see an empty state indicating no tasks exist
stories.notes: Foundation feature for the walking skeleton

stories.title: Display due date alongside task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to see the due date displayed alongside each task, so that I can quickly identify upcoming deadlines.
acceptance_criteria: Given a task has a due date When I view the task list Then the due date is visible next to the task title
Given a task has no due date When I view the task list Then no due date is displayed for that task

epics.name: Task Filtering
epics.description: Enable users to filter their task list by completion status to focus on relevant tasks and reduce visual clutter.

stories.title: Filter to show incomplete tasks only
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my task list to show only incomplete tasks, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I apply the incomplete filter Then only incomplete tasks are displayed
Given I have the incomplete filter active When I complete a task Then that task is removed from the filtered view

stories.title: Filter to show completed tasks only
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my task list to show only completed tasks, so that I can review what I have accomplished.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I apply the completed filter Then only completed tasks are displayed
Given I have the completed filter active When I mark a task incomplete Then that task is removed from the filtered view

epics.name: Data Persistence
epics.description: Ensure user tasks are reliably saved and available across app sessions and without internet connectivity.

stories.title: Persist tasks across app restarts
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my tasks to persist across app restarts, so that I never lose my task data.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I close and reopen the app Then all my tasks are still visible
Given I have marked tasks complete When I close and reopen the app Then the completion status is preserved
stories.notes: Foundation feature - required for walking skeleton to be meaningful

stories.title: Manage tasks offline
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view and manage my tasks without an internet connection, so that I can stay productive regardless of connectivity.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have no internet connection When I open the app Then I can view all my existing tasks
Given I have no internet connection When I create, complete, or delete tasks Then the changes are saved locally
stories.notes: Assumed requirement for personal productivity apps

epics.name: Performance and Responsiveness
epics.description: Ensure all task operations feel instantaneous to provide a frictionless user experience.

stories.title: Instantaneous task action response
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want task actions to feel instantaneous, so that the app does not slow down my workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Given I create a task When I confirm the creation Then the task appears in under 200ms
Given I complete or delete a task When I perform the action Then the UI updates in under 200ms
stories.notes: Performance requirement - may require optimization pass after core features
